## Describe the bug
A clear, short description of the bug.

## To reproduce
Steps to reproduce:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'
4. See the error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If helpful, add screenshots.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- Node version (if build/dev): [e.g. 20.x]
- Base path (if relevant): [e.g. `/knowledge-base` or root]

## Additional context
Any other details (console errors, network tab, etc.).
